sharedjourney.fullmap.hint: Drag: pan | Wheel: zoom | Right-click: new waypoint | Click marker: edit
sharedjourney.waypoint.name: Name
sharedjourney.waypoint.group.tooltip: Start typing to filter the existing groups; a new name creates the group. Public waypoints use the reserved "Public" group.
sharedjourney.waypoint.type.tooltip: Private: only you see it. Public: shared with every player on the server. Temporary: automatically deleted when reached.
sharedjourney.command.purged: %s cached region file(s) deleted for layer '%s'
sharedjourney.waypoints.title: Waypoints
sharedjourney.waypoints.group_toggle: Show or hide every waypoint of this group
sharedjourney.waypoints.group_delete_con: Delete the group "%s" and its %s waypoint(s)?
sharedjourney.coords.open: Click to open the map here
sharedjourney.action.hide_from_map: Hide me from other players' maps
sharedjourney.configuration.title: Shared Journey Configs
sharedjourney.configuration.layers.toolt: Layer configuration: which map layers are rendered per dimension.
sharedjourney.configuration.defaultLayer: Active layers for dimensions not listed in Shared Layers.
sharedjourney.configuration.caveBands.to: Y-bands rendered for the CAVE layer (band = floor(y/16)). Example: -1 → y=-16..-1.
sharedjourney.configuration.biomeBlendRa: Smoothing radius for biome-dependent colors (water, grass, foliage). 0 = off, 2 = vanilla equivalent.
sharedjourney.configuration.hiddenBlocks: Blocks excluded from map rendering (the block below is painted instead). Format: 'namespace:block' or '#namespace:tag'.
sharedjourney.configuration.sync.tooltip: Map synchronisation settings between server and clients.
sharedjourney.configuration.corner.toolt: Screen corner where the minimap is displayed.
sharedjourney.configuration.rotateWithPl: Rotate the minimap to match the player's look direction (false = north always up).
sharedjourney.configuration.showCoordina: Show the player's coordinates below the minimap.
sharedjourney.configuration.radius.toolt: Radar range in blocks (capped by the server's radarMaxRadius).
Show other players on the radar.
Ask the server to hide you from other players' maps.
Show hostile mobs on the radar.
Show passive mobs on the radar.
sharedjourney.configuration.showPets.too: Show tamed animals on the radar.
sharedjourney.configuration.deathWaypoin: Allow automatic death waypoints. Each client also has its own on/off toggle.
sharedjourney.configuration.waypointStor: Where players' own waypoints are stored: SERVER (persisted per-player, private) or CLIENT (purely local, previous behavior). Temporary waypoints always stay client-local; public waypoints always go through the server.
sharedjourney.configuration.tempWaypoint: Distance (blocks) at which a temporary waypoint is considered reached and deleted.
sharedjourney.configuration.waypointBeac: Show a vertical beam and the waypoint name in the world.
sharedjourney.configuration.beaconMinDis: Below this distance (blocks) the beacon is hidden.
sharedjourney.configuration.beaconMaxDis: Beyond this distance (blocks) the beacon is hidden.
sharedjourney.configuration.deathWaypoin: Automatically create a waypoint where you die ("deaths" group). Also requires the server to allow it.
sharedjourney.configuration.showWaypoint: Show waypoint names on the fullscreen map and on beacons (waystones included).
sharedjourney.configuration.map.tooltip: Overlays, layer selection and disk cache.
sharedjourney.configuration.showTrainOve: Show Create tracks, stations and trains on the maps (via the JourneyMap bridge).
sharedjourney.configuration.showDepositO: Show discovered Create: Rock & Stone deposits on the maps (via the JourneyMap bridge).
sharedjourney.configuration.showGrid.too: Overlay the chunk grid on the minimap and the fullscreen map.
sharedjourney.configuration.showCave.too: Automatically switch to cave layers when underground.
sharedjourney.configuration.defaultLayer: Layer displayed when connecting to a server (DAY, NIGHT, TOPO, BIOME, CAVE).
sharedjourney.configuration.autoLayer.to: Automatically switch the minimap: day/night with the time, cave layers when underground.
sharedjourney.configuration.diskCache.to: Cache received map tiles to disk (.minecraft/sharedjourney_cache/).
sharedjourney.configuration.fragmentSize: Maximum network fragment size in bytes.
